mental_emotional.text: Delirium associated with restlessness, loquacity. Tendency to escape from bed; ravings, pains cause fainting

stomach_abdomen.text: Watery diarrhœa, profuse with sinking sensation, Cholera morbus. Hæmorrhoids

skin.text: Lymphatic glands enlarged and indurated. Boils and slowly suppurating abscesses

keynotes.text: color="#800000">OPERCULINA TURPENTHUM Nishope (OPERCULINA TURPETHUM) A remedy for plague, fevers, diarrhœa.
